bugfix/issue-47-agents-skip-formal-model.approach: Add hard gates, MUST_NOT_SKIP markers, advisory baseline presence checks, and anti-urgency guardrails to the /nf:quick --full workflow to prevent agents from bypassing formal modeling verification steps.
out_of_scope: Modifying the formal model files themselves (.tla, .als, .prism files)
Changing the core formal verification tools (TLC, Alloy, PRISM runtimes)
Implementing new formal modeling capabilities beyond the existing quick --full pathway
Updating quick mode without --full flag (gates apply to --full mode only)
bugfix/issue-47-agents-skip-formal-model.risk_reason: Workflow file modification (core/workflows/quick.md) to add hard gates and formal modeling enforcement across multiple steps, combined with potential formal model file changes.
